mapper.delete: delete from project_signup where user_id = #{userId} and project_id = #{projectId}
mapper.select:
select ps.*, count(case when sg.status != '已通过' then 1 end) as pendingSignupCount from project_study ps left join project_signup sg on ps.id = sg.project_id
and ps.theme like concat('%',#{theme},'%')
and ps.category = #{category}
and ps.status = '待审核'
and exists ( select 1 from project_signup psg where psg.project_id = ps.id and psg.status != '已通过' )
group by ps.id order by pendingSignupCount desc, ps.status desc, ps.update_time desc
select distinct category from project_study where category is not null and category != '' order by category

select u.id as userId, u.name, u.role, u.avatar, ps.status, ps.remark, ps.create_time from project_signup as ps join user as u on ps.user_id = u.id where ps.project_id=#{projectId} order by ps.status desc;
mapper.insert: insert into project_study(cover_path, theme, introduction, content, category, capacity, status, create_time, update_time, like_count, click_count) values(#{coverPath}, #{theme}, #{introduction}, #{content}, #{category}, #{capacity}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime},#{likeCount},#{clickCount})
insert into project_signup(user_id, project_id, status, create_time) values(#{userId}, #{projectId}, #{status}, #{createTime})
